title: jaltomata pallascana
intro: Jaltomata pallascana is a species of flowering plant in the nightshade family, also known as Solanaceae. It is native to Mexico and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, sore throats, and respiratory issues. The plant is believed to have anti-inflammatory properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing pain and swelling, and aiding in the treatment of conditions such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of Jaltomata pallascana typically involve infusions or decoctions made from its leaves, stems, or roots, which can be used to brew teas or made into tinctures for medicinal purposes.
